content.speakerText: Thanks, everyone—this was way more insightful than I expected.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家，这次讨论比我预期深刻多了。

options.text: Same here! Let’s keep this convo going on the Discord group.
Yeah, good talk. See you later.
I didn’t learn anything, thanks anyway.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体行动（继续在Discord群聊）体现真诚致谢，符合场景要求。选项2虽礼貌但缺乏深度回应；选项3自相矛盾且不礼貌；选项4冷漠且不恰当，不符合礼貌结束的语境。

content.speakerText: I really appreciated our discussion today.
content.speakerTextCn: 我非常感谢今天的讨论。

options.text: Me too! I’ll send you the reading list I mentioned.
Yeah, I guess it was okay.
Bye, I have to go now.

content.explanation: 正确答案通过提供具体行动（发送阅读清单）体现真诚和延续性，符合礼貌结束的高阶表达。选项2和3态度敷衍，缺乏尊重；选项4虽是告别但未回应感谢，显得冷漠。

content.speakerText: This meeting was so helpful—thank you for your time.
content.speakerTextCn: 这次会议非常有帮助，感谢你的时间。

options.text: It was my pleasure. Let’s schedule another chat next week.
You’re welcome. I’m done with this now.
Thanks for saying that. I’m tired.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了礼貌回应（It was my pleasure）并提出未来行动（安排下次聊天），体现专业与真诚。选项2过于随意；选项3虽礼貌但结尾消极；选项4转移焦点到自己感受，不合礼仪。

content.template: I really appreciate your insights—I'll ___ your points in my paper.
content.hint: 在学术语境中，表达‘引用他人观点’的动词
content.knowledgePoint: 学术场景核心动词搭配（cite + points）

content.template: Let’s ___ this conversation on the group chat.
content.hint: 表示‘继续’某事的常用短语，常用于礼貌延续交流
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：keep this conversation going

content.template: It was ___ pleasure meeting you. I look forward to ___ next week.
content.hint: 标准告别句型，表达期待下次见面
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：It was a pleasure... / look forward to + 动名词

content.speakerText: Thanks, everyone—this was way more insightful than I expected.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢大家，这次讨论比我预期深刻多了。
expectedAnswers: Same here! I’ll share the notes in the Discord group.
I really appreciate your perspectives—I’ll reference them in my research.
This was amazing! Let’s definitely meet again next week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚感谢并回应了对方的积极评价
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'appreciate', 'continue', 'next time'

content.speakerText: I really learned a lot today—thank you for your time.
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天学到了很多，感谢你的时间。
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! I'm glad it was helpful. Let’s stay in touch via email.
Thank you for saying that—I really enjoyed our chat too.
It was my pleasure! I’ll send you the resource I mentioned earlier.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了感谢并传递了积极、延续性的态度
语言准确性：使用了恰当的礼貌表达如 'You're welcome', 'my pleasure'
表达自然度：语气真诚，不生硬，符合社交语境
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'helpful', 'stay in touch', 'send', 'resource' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: This discussion was incredibly valuable. I’m grateful for your input.
content.speakerTextCn: 这次讨论非常有价值，感谢你的贡献。
expectedAnswers: I’m so glad you found it useful—I’ll follow up with you on LinkedIn.
Thank you! Your insights really made me think differently.
Absolutely! Let’s connect before the next session to share ideas.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否既表达了感谢，又主动提出后续互动方式
语言准确性：语法结构完整，用词正式且恰当
表达自然度：语气真诚、有温度，非机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'valuable', 'insights', 'connect', 'follow up' 等高阶表达
